_comment: Mid-call state for edison_agent. Simulates entry after edison_rewrite_query has already produced a rewritten_query. The route_rewrite_entry conditional will route directly to edison_search because skip_rewrite=false but rewritten_query is already set — edison_search reads rewritten_query preferentially. Alternatively, set skip_rewrite=true to bypass rewriting and test edison_search directly with original_query.
context: Evaluating whether PBO-treated and dual-active-ingredient (DAI) LLINs justify their higher procurement cost (~$3.50–4.50 vs ~$2.00 for standard nets) in program contexts with confirmed pyrethroid resistance. Looking for health-economic analyses and cost-per-DALY-averted estimates.
rewritten_query: cost-effectiveness analysis piperonyl butoxide (PBO) pyrethroid combination insecticide-treated nets versus standard LLINs malaria prevention sub-Saharan Africa pyrethroid resistance settings cost per DALY
